subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort was built by Maharaja Man Singh I of Amer?
question_hi: मैन सिंह I अमेर के बनाया गया फोट क्या था?
explanation_en: Maharaja Man Singh I of Amer built the Hawa Mahal, also known as the Palace of Winds. It is a famous monument located in Jaipur, Rajasthan.

explanation_en: Maharaja Man Singh I built the Amer Fort, also known as Amer Fort, is a famous landmark in Jaipur, Rajasthan. The correct answer is Amer Fort.
